---
title: 'Car Trouble.......... again..........'
date: '2015-02-01T04:07:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1624725987255222380'
blogger_filename: '/2015/01/car-trouble-again.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Car'
---

<br />
<br />
So... On 01/18/15, Sunday, 03:54 pm CT. We received citation #34497 from the City of Haslet. We were under the impression that the new law stated that we did not have get the van inspected, in fact should not, until the registration became due. However, we were informed by the police officer that this was not true yet, and instead of a warning, he gave us a ticket. When a new confusing law/rule is passed, you should not cite people for trying to follow it. This only adds my distrust of all agencies, governments or large institutions.<br />
<br />
Anyhow, we should have researched it better, listened more, go left not straight... whatever. We got the ticket. Now we are forced with the decision. The Honda has a check engine light on, which means we need to figure that out before we can pass inspection. The window is broken, the air conditioner doesn't work, and the van sputters and makes gas smells.<br />
<br />
So, we are rushing to rid ourselves of this van, and get a new car. All of a sudden. If there is anything I DESPISE, it's all of sudden type decisions. <br />
<br />
So here we are, it's 01/31/15. We owe $118.00 for this ticket on or before 02/17/15. We also have to figure out what to do about the car. We've looked for cars with the money we have on hand. We figured we can sell the van wholesale for $500.00. We can afford about $1000-$1200 cash right now, barely.<br />
<br />
So far, God hasn't shown up to have someone call us and say "God told me to give you a car...", but He still could!<br />
<br />
We looked at a car that looked promising today. It was listed for $1,400. She didn't say on the listing all that it needed. We offered $1,200 by email before going, she said that would be acceptable. <br />
<br />
Concerns:<br />
<ul>
<li>It only has a Valet key, so you have to jimmy the trunk through the back seat. (Cost of replacing the right key - $120-$250).&nbsp;</li>
<li>The car was in an accident and several things were replaced, who knows if that's all that was needed.&nbsp;</li>
<li>The back tire is flat, but it's NEW. So was it improperly seated, or was the rim damaged in the accident? Unknown.I know a possible fix, may take work.&nbsp;</li>
<li>The fuel pump is going, but it's theoretically covered by a recall and could be replaced for free? Have to have that looked at by Volvo.&nbsp;</li>
<li>A/C Unknown?</li>
<li>Repairs can be expensive.</li>
<li>Tires can be expensive.&nbsp; </li>
<li>Registration/Taxes based on value, not sale price.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Will it work for the rest of this year and next? Am I getting myself into more work? Unknown. </li>
</ul>
<br />
On the Plus Side:<br />
<ul>
<li>Check Engine light is not on.  </li>
<li>Decent exterior.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Decent interior.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Radio works. </li>
<li>Starts rough with fuel pump issue, but it runs and idles well once it's on, the transmission shifts well. No jerks.&nbsp;</li>
<li>The brakes seem to work, hard to tell when you can't drive it far with a flat tire.&nbsp;</li>
<li>This model has an 8.3-10 consumer rating (based on reviews from last year!)</li>
<li>Volvo's are nice cars, akin to BMW and Mercedes, but not as pricy. </li>
<li>I've always kept my eye on Volvo as a car I'd like to own one day.</li>
<li>The seat is more comfortable than the van. </li>
<li>Better gas mileage than the van.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<br />
So, I offered $1,000, based on the work I'm going to have to do (tire, fuel pump, key fab, unknown more). It will mean working on this tomorrow, and getting up early Monday to take it to Volvo, and then get the family home before going to work. <br />
<br />
We'll see what she says. I'm actually not positive that I would be willing to pay more. Maybe? I don't know. Probably not. We'll see. I'm not even sure I'm doing the right thing at $1,000. But I feel 51% OK with that figure?<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------<br />

  <tbody>
<tr>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.7208in;">

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.8666in;">

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.7208in;">

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.8666in;">

VEHICLE SPEED
   CONTROL </div>
</td>
  </tr>
<tr>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.7208in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Model Affected </div>

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.8666in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
S60 </div>

  </tr>

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.7208in;">

Potential Units
   Affected </div>

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.8666in;">

170099 </div>

</tbody></table>
</div>
<div style="direction: ltr;">
 <table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; border-color: #A3A3A3; border-style: solid; border-width: 0pt; direction: ltr;" valign="top">
  <tbody>
<tr>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 5.3958in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Recall ID # 46734
   - SERVICE BRAKES, HYDRAULIC:FOUNDATION COMPONENTS:MASTER CYLINDER </div>

   - EQUIPMENT:ELECTRICAL:NAVIGATIONAL SYSTEM(GLOBAL POSITIONING SYSTEM) </div>

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 5.2611in;">

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.6666in;">

Component </div>

   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 5.2611in;">

EQUIPMENT:ELECTRICAL:NAVIGATIONAL
   SYSTEM(GLOBAL POSITIONING SYSTEM) </div>
</td>
  </tr>
<tr>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 1.6666in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Model Affected </div>
</td>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 5.2611in;">

<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="color: black;">Read more: </span><a href="http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/#ixzz3QS7I1fQI">http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/#ixzz3QS7I1fQI</a></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;">
From
 &lt;<a href="http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/">http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/</a>&gt;
 </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="direction: ltr;">
 <table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; border-color: #A3A3A3; border-style: solid; border-width: 0pt; direction: ltr;" valign="top">
  <tbody>
<tr>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: 4.3784in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Recall ID # 32786
   - FUEL SYSTEM, GASOLINE:DELIVERY:FUEL PUMP </div>
</td>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: .6881in;">
   <div style="margin: 0in;">
<img alt="Plus" height="16" src="file:///C:\Users\DARREL~2\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image013.png" width="16" /></div>
</td>
   <td style="border-width: 0pt; padding: 2.0pt 3.0pt 2.0pt 3.0pt; vertical-align: top; width: .9909in;">
   <div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<a href="http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/">Hide Details</a>
   </div>
</td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Recall Date:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
APR 05, 2007</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Model Affected:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
2002 Volvo S60</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Summary:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="background: lime; mso-highlight: lime;">ON CERTAIN VEHICLES ORIGINALLY SOLD
 IN OR CURRENTLY REGISTERED IN THE STATES OF ARIZONA AND NEVADA, DUE TO THE
 COMBINATION OF FUEL QUALITY AND CLIMATE CONDITIONS, THE FUEL PUMP MAY, IN
 CERTAIN CASES, EXPERIENCE A REDUCED FUNCTIONALITY. THE MOST COMMON SYMPTOMS
 WOULD BE FUEL ODOR.</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Consequences:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
FUEL LEAKAGE IN THE
 PRESENCE OF AN IGNITION SOURCE COULD RESULT IN A FIRE.</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Remedy:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
DEALERS WILL
 REPLACE THE FUEL PUMP FREE OF CHARGE. THE RECALL BEGAN ON JULY 10, 2007.
 OWNERS MAY CONTACT VOLVO AT 1-800-458-1552.</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Potential Units
 Affected:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
2310</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Notes:</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
VOLVO CARS OF N.A.
 LLC.</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="color: black;">Read more: </span><a href="http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/#ixzz3QS7aMBsc">http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/#ixzz3QS7aMBsc</a></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;">
From
 &lt;<a href="http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/">http://www.motortrend.com/cars/2002/volvo/s60/recalls/</a>&gt;
 </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<a href="http://www.autotrader.com/cars-for-sale/searchresults.xhtml;jsessionid=67285AD72DB4E49C4E34C8F0C1ABB758?zip=76052&amp;endYear=2002&amp;modelCode1=S60&amp;makeCode1=VOLVO&amp;startYear=2002&amp;listingType=all&amp;LNX=PNADAUSEDVDPTEASER&amp;searchRadius=25">http://www.autotrader.com/cars-for-sale/searchresults.xhtml;jsessionid=67285AD72DB4E49C4E34C8F0C1ABB758?zip=76052&amp;endYear=2002&amp;modelCode1=S60&amp;makeCode1=VOLVO&amp;startYear=2002&amp;listingType=all&amp;LNX=PNADAUSEDVDPTEASER&amp;searchRadius=25</a></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<img alt="Machine generated alternative text:
Used 2002 Volvo S60 24T AWD 
$6,495

1-855-214-0385 " height="376" src="file:///C:\Users\DARREL~2\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image014.png" width="576" /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">2002 Volvo S60 Consumer Reviews</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Overall Rating</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="background: lime; mso-highlight: lime;">8.3</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="background: lime; mso-highlight: lime;">Out of 10 </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Based on <a href="http://www.kbb.com/volvo/s60/2002-volvo-s60/sedan-4d-consumer_reviews/?vehicleid=5005">347
 Ratings</a> for the 2001 - 2005 models. </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<a href="http://www.kbb.com/volvo/s60/2002-volvo-s60/sedan-4d-consumer_reviews_write_review/?vehicleid=5005">Review
 this car</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Comfort, performance and dependebility</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By Charles on
 Saturday, December 27, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I own this car - My approximate mileage is 68,500</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 10
 of 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Pros:&nbsp;</span>"quicly accelerates,
 comfortable, minimal costs"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Cons:&nbsp;</span>"not a sports car but with
 sport bumper and sides,"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;10</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"Bought the
 car with sports grill and bumpers because of sleekness. Great on highway with
 turbo that kicks in and quickly accelerates, but still gets &gt;30mpg highway
 at 89 mph. This car remains stylish, and costs for repairs though often high,
 are infrequent over 10 years. The Swedes build a great auto!!" </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">8</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">11</span>
 found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41678656&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41678656&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41678656&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Love this car. Best all around sedan I've owned.</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By Arrrrr on
 Wednesday, December 17, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I own this car - My approximate mileage is 135,000</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 9 of
 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Pros:&nbsp;</span>"You'll unlikely find a better
 car for the money."</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Cons:&nbsp;</span>"Maintenance costs."</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;8</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"This car is
 an excellent blend of go fast and comfort. It will go and stop in any weather.
 Extremely responsive to driver inputs. It is also deceptively powerful.
 Doesn't attract attention. Does keep yours." </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">6</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">8</span>
 found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41525188&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41525188&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=41525188&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Good Ride, Bad Drive</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By DylPickle on
 Thursday, August 21, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I own this car - My approximate mileage is 190,000</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 7 of
 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;2</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"It rides like
 a Buick. Like floating on pillows for suspension. Very well designed interior
 and high quality options, great sound system, and not bad looking on the
 exterior. But being behind the wheel is dismal. Unresponsive steering,
 braking, AND throttle. But, there are plenty of people that don't care about
 that stuff. If you are one of those people, then this is indeed an excellent
 car." </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">8</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">11</span>
 found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38868328&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38868328&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38868328&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">In for the long haul</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By Kay on Tuesday,
 July 22, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I own this car - My approximate mileage is 100,000</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 10
 of 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Pros:&nbsp;</span>"Comfort, turn on a dime,
 great control!"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Cons:&nbsp;</span>"Some of the plastic amenities
 have turned to ..."</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;10</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"Bought this
 car used, for $7500 with 45,000 miles on it. Up until 99,000 miles, with
 regular service ( every 4,500 miles) it has been a true workhorse. Fan
 replaced at 98,000 miles and have had A/C problems ever since. Drove it from
 Rhode Island to Florida, in perfect comfort! I have two slipped discs and have
 yet to find another car that gives the comfort and support while driving. The
 deep seats, dual A/C, huge trunk, great leg room, great and comfy back seats!
 Have loved this car from day 1 and feel that I got a great deal at a great
 price. Looking into the XC6o now.. cannot give up these fabulous seats." </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">8</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">14</span>
 found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38326091&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38326091&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=38326091&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Wonderful, comfortable, and efficient.</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By Volvo Driver on
 Monday, May 19, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I own this car - My approximate mileage is 147,750</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 9 of
 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Pros:&nbsp;</span>"Comfort, efficiency, power,
 features"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Cons:&nbsp;</span>"Limited legroom in the back
 seat."</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;9</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"I purchased
 this car off of a lease. I have driven this car over 110K miles in the last 8
 years and have loved it every time I got into it. It is comfortable for me at
 6'4" though the legroom in the back seat leaves a bit to be desired as my
 kids grow. It is great in the rain and snow and got me through two harsh South
 Dakota winters. The stereo system is pure joy. The leather is the softest I
 have ever felt even in other European sedans at much higher price points.
 There is a surprising amount of trunk space. There is ample power and yet I
 still manage to get as much as 31.5MPG on the highway with 85 octane fuel. I
 would strongly recommend this vehicle." </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">16</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">21</span> found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=36726412&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=36726412&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=36726412&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">saved my cousins lives</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
By matt on
 Thursday, March 20, 2014</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">I want this car </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
overall rating 10
 of 10<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null">rating details</a> </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Pros:&nbsp;</span>"safe"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">Cons:&nbsp;</span>"nothing"</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Likely to recommend
 this car? (1-10):&nbsp;10</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
"my cousins
 were brod sided at high speed and walked away they bolt another and the s60
 extremly safe" </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">8</span> people out of <span style="font-weight: bold;">10</span>
 found this review helpful</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Was this review
 helpful to you?&nbsp; <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=35131483&amp;bvaction=addpositivefeedback">yes</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=35131483&amp;bvaction=addnegativefeedback">no</a>
 | <a href="http://www.kbb.com/userratings/review/?id=0&amp;generationid=1382&amp;bvreviewid=35131483&amp;bvaction=inappropriate">report
 abuse</a> </div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
&lt;<r29076 .pdf="">&gt;</r29076></div>
<div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;">
From
 &lt;<a href="http://www.kbb.com/volvo/s60/2002-volvo-s60/">http://www.kbb.com/volvo/s60/2002-volvo-s60/</a>&gt;
 </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<img alt="Machine generated alternative text:
VIN 
Recall Date 
Model 
Recall Info 
Manufacturer Recall Number 
NHTSA Recall Number 
Safety Risk 
Remedy 
Recall Status 
Notes 
WI RHö8D6221 6841 1 
Mar 18, 2010 
S60 
Recall 220: Fuel Pump Inspect &amp; Replace If Necessary 
R29076 
091/483 
Volvo Cars of Nonh America, LLC. (Volvo) has determined that a defect related to motor vehicle safety exists in 
the fuel pump of certain model year 2001 -2005 S80, 2001 -2004 S60, V70, V70XCDC70 and 2003-2005 
XC90 vehicles that were sold, or are registered in the states of Alabama, Arizona, Arkansas, California, Florida, 
Georgia, Hawaii, Kentucky, Louisiana, Mississippi, Nevada, New Mexico, Nonh Carolina, Oklahoma, South 
Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, District of Columbia and U.S. Territories. If a vehicle owner has 
received this letter and does not currently reside in one of the States or U.S. Territories listed above, or if the 
vehicle is not pan of the model years listed above, it is because our records indicate that the vehicle was originally 
sold in one of these States or U.S. Territories, or has been fitted with the concerned component and is eligible for 
this recall. Volvo investigations have identified that a specific version of the fuel pump can when exposed to certain 
environmental conditions (hot climate and temperature cycling) over time and in combination of varying fuel quality, 
develop cracks in the fuel pump flange. If the condition occurs you may notice fuel smell and/or fuel seepage. 
The corrective action will be to inspect the version of the fuel pump installed in the vehicle per the instructions in 
RTJ 22721 , and if necessary replace the fuel pump with a pan of a modified design. 
Recall INCOMPLETE. 
For Recalls prior to August 1999, contact Customer Care @ 1-800-458-1552 Mon-Fri 8:30am-5pm EST OR " height="322" src="file:///C:\Users\DARREL~2\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image015.png" width="576" /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<ul style="direction: ltr; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: 0in; margin-top: 0in; unicode-bidi: embed;" type="disc">
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">VIN<br />
            YV1RH58D622168411</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Recall Date<br />
            Mar 18, 2010</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Model<br />
            S60</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Recall Info<br />
            Recall 220: Fuel Pump Inspect &amp; Replace If Necessary</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Manufacturer Recall
      Number<br />
            R29076</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">NHTSA Recall Number<br />
            09V483</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Safety Risk<br />
            Volvo Cars of North America, LLC. (Volvo) has determined that a
      defect related to motor vehicle safety exists in the fuel pump of certain
      model year 2001-2005 S80, 2001-2004 S60, V70, V70XC/XC70 and 2003-2005
      XC90 vehicles that were sold, or are registered in the states of Alabama,
      Arizona, Arkansas, California, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Kentucky,
      Louisiana, Mississippi, Nevada, New Mexico, North Carolina, Oklahoma,
      South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, District of Columbia
      and U.S. Territories. If a vehicle owner has received this letter and
      does not currently reside in one of the States or U.S. Territories listed
      above, or if the vehicle is not part of the model years listed above, it
      is because our records indicate that the vehicle was originally sold in
      one of these States or U.S. Territories, or has been fitted with the
      concerned component and is eligible for this recall. Volvo investigations
      have identified that a specific version of the fuel pump can when exposed
      to certain environmental conditions (hot climate and temperature cycling)
      over time and in combination of varying fuel quality, develop cracks in
      the fuel pump flange. If the condition occurs you may notice fuel smell
      and/or fuel seepage.</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Remedy<br />
            The corrective action will be to inspect the version of the fuel
      pump installed in the vehicle per the instructions in RTJ 22721, and if
      necessary replace the fuel pump with a part of a modified design.</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Recall Status<br />
            Recall INCOMPLETE.</span></li>
<li style="margin-bottom: 0; margin-top: 0; vertical-align: middle;"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">Notes<br />
            For Recalls prior to August 1999, contact Customer Care @
      1-800-458-1552 Mon-Fri 8:30am-5pm EST OR </span><a href="http://www.volvocars.com/us/footer/contactus"><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">http://www.volvocars.com/us/footer/contactus</span></a><span style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">.</span></li>
</ul>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 12.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-weight: bold;">For more information and instructions on this recall</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;">
From
 &lt;<a href="http://www.volvocars.com/us/services/own-and-enjoy/recall-information?vin=YV1RH58D622168411#recall-search">http://www.volvocars.com/us/services/own-and-enjoy/recall-information?vin=YV1RH58D622168411#recall-search</a>&gt;
 </div>
